title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.8 — BACKLIT TUNE: (1) buttons now GROW to fill each panel (cellHFor: cell height = panel height / rows) so GRIT's tiles are tall and there's no dead space — matches the mockup proportions; (2) much stronger AMBER glow + contrast: caps are near-black warm with a strong amber bloom, legends glow via a warm-amber colour (EB::glowFor/labelFor/valueFor = amber tinted toward the module accent) with a proper multi-ring halo. Paint + fill only, DSP untouched. VERIFY GRIT proportions fill the panel and the amber glow reads like the mockup. NOTE: AMBER has 5 rows so its cells are a touch shorter than GRIT/COMPRESS (4 rows) under fixed panel height — if you want them all identical, that needs the ragged-panel + raised-bottom rework. Remaining: GRIT deep controls -> TWEAK, AMBER vertical stage-tags, top-down GR meter, raise bottom section.
